subject.target: canonical SCSS contract and helper boundaries

units.purpose: define which contract variables and Sass helpers are authoritative and deprecate legacy aliases

messagePreview.header: refactor(ui): lock canonical SCSS contract and helper boundaries
summary: keep token lookup helpers that prevent duplicated Sass map access
deprecate legacy contract aliases in favor of semantic custom properties
document the minimal helper surface allowed in the styling system

units.purpose: remove parallel breakpoint and typography definitions that compete with the token system

messagePreview.header: refactor(ui): reduce global SCSS authoring layer duplication
summary: move shared authoring rules toward the canonical token and tools layers
remove duplicated breakpoint and typography ownership from globals
keep only mixins that provide real reusable authoring value

subject.target: theme preset and wrapper surface area

units.purpose: restrict presets to variable assignment and remove low-value wrapper layers

messagePreview.header: refactor(ui): thin theme preset and wrapper surface area
summary: separate token assignment from selector-based component behavior
remove wrapper files that only mirror runtime custom properties
preserve existing presets while simplifying their ownership boundaries

subject.target: style consumers to canonical semantic variables

units.purpose: update component and page styles to consume canonical semantic variables instead of legacy aliases

messagePreview.header: refactor(ui): migrate style consumers to canonical semantic variables
summary: replace legacy contract aliases with semantic token consumption
standardize module imports and remove wildcard Sass usage
document the simplified contribution rules for future SCSS changes
